妓.origin: 由“女”和“支”组成，“支”也提示读音。

sentence.cn: 这个字里有“女”字旁，读作妓。
sentence.en: This character has the woman radical and is read jì.

妖.origin: “女”表示意思，“夭”提示读音，指奇怪的精怪。

sentence.en: There is a big monster in the story.
This song is truly wonderful.

妞.origin: “女”加“丑”，是对小女孩的亲切叫法。

sentence.en: That little girl is very cute.

妥.origin: 上面是手“爫”，下面是“女”，表示安排得当、稳妥。

sentence.en: Everything has been settled properly.

妾.origin: 古时指地位较低的小老婆。

sentence.en: The book talks about wives and concubines in ancient times.

姑.origin: “女”加“古”，指爸爸的姐妹，也叫姑姑。

sentence.en: My aunt likes me very much.

姓.origin: “女”加“生”，指家族传下来的姓氏。

sentence.en: Please write down your full name.
He entrusted this matter to me.

姚.origin: “女”表示意思，“兆”提示读音，常用作姓。

sentence.en: My classmate's surname is Yao.

姜.origin: 一种又香又辣的根，做菜常用，也用作姓。

sentence.en: Mom put ginger in the dish.

姨.origin: “女”加“夷”，指妈妈的姐妹，也叫阿姨。

sentence.en: Auntie bought me candy.

威.origin: 有力量、让人敬畏的样子，叫威风。

sentence.en: The big lion is very impressive.
My little sister is holding a doll.

娇.origin: “女”表示意思，“乔”提示读音，形容娇嫩可爱。

sentence.en: This flower is very delicate.
That girl is singing.

娶.origin: 上面是“取”，下面是“女”，指男子结婚把妻子接回家。

sentence.en: My uncle is getting married this year.
This word contains the character chāng.
They are getting married tomorrow.

媒.origin: “女”表示意思，“某”提示读音，原指帮人说亲的人。

sentence.en: The matchmaker helped them get to know each other.

媚.origin: “女”加“眉”，形容样子好看、讨人喜欢。

sentence.en: The spring scenery is bright and lovely.

嫁.origin: “女”加“家”，指女子结婚到男方家。

sentence.en: My older sister will get married next year.
My sister-in-law cooks delicious food.

嫌.origin: “女”加“兼”，有不喜欢、嫌弃的意思。

sentence.en: He thinks this soup is too salty.
This character is read piáo.

嫩.origin: 形容又软又新鲜，刚长出来的样子。

sentence.en: The grass in spring is very tender.

孕.origin: 里面有个“子”，表示妈妈肚子里有了小宝宝。

sentence.en: Mom said she is pregnant.

存.origin: 有保留、放着不动的意思。

sentence.en: I save up my pocket money.

孙.origin: “子”加“小”，指儿女的孩子，是孙子孙女。

sentence.en: Grandpa loves his grandson very much.

孝.origin: 上面像老人，下面是“子”，指孩子敬爱老人。

sentence.en: He is a filial child.
He feels very lonely all by himself.
This character means 'not good', nāo.

孵.origin: “卵”加“孚”，指母鸡趴在蛋上把小鸡孵出来。

sentence.en: The hen is hatching her chicks.

宁.origin: 宝盖头“宀”是屋顶，下面是“丁”，表示安静、平安。

sentence.en: The night is very peaceful.

宅.origin: 宝盖头“宀”表示房子，指住的地方。

sentence.en: This is a big house.

宇.origin: 宝盖头“宀”表示房子，也指广大的空间。

sentence.en: The universe is very big.

安.origin: 屋子“宀”里有个“女”，表示平安、安静。

sentence.en: Be careful and stay safe when crossing the road.

宋.origin: 屋子“宀”里有“木”，是一个朝代的名字，也用作姓。

sentence.en: The teacher told a story about the Song dynasty.

宗.origin: 屋子“宀”里有祭台“示”，指祖先和家族。

sentence.en: We should remember our ancestors.

宛.origin: 宝盖头“宀”提示意思，有好像、仿佛的意思。

sentence.en: She sings just like a little bird.

宜.origin: 屋子“宀”里安排得当，表示合适。

sentence.en: This place is suitable for a walk.

宠.origin: 屋子“宀”里养着“龙”，表示特别疼爱。

sentence.en: My family has a pet cat.

审.origin: 宝盖头“宀”加“申”，指仔细看、仔细查。

sentence.en: The teacher is checking the homework.

宣.origin: 在屋子里大声告诉大家，叫宣布。

sentence.en: The teacher announced a holiday.

室.origin: 宝盖头“宀”表示房子，指屋子、房间。

sentence.en: We have class in the classroom.

宫.origin: 宝盖头“宀”下面有相连的房间，指帝王住的大房子。

sentence.en: The emperor lives in a great palace.

宰.origin: 有杀牲口、也有主管的意思。

sentence.en: A pig is slaughtered for the New Year.

宴.origin: 在屋子“宀”里摆酒席请客，叫宴会。

sentence.en: They held a banquet.

容.origin: 有容纳、样子的意思，如容易、笑容。

sentence.en: This problem is very easy.

宽.origin: 宝盖头“宀”表示空间大，指又宽又大。

sentence.en: This road is wide and long.
